name: CROSS COUNTRY HEALTHCARE INC
business: Cross Country Healthcare is a healthcare workforce solutions company delivering an AI-powered digital platform and advisory services, and providing total talent management including contingent staffing, permanent placement, and consultative services to healthcare providers across the continuum of care.

exposures.sentence: Cross Country Healthcare, Inc. (Nasdaq: CCRN) is a healthcare workforce solutions company delivering an AI-powered digital platform and advisory services, backed by nearly 40 years of healthcare labor expertise, to help health systems optimize and sustain their entire labor ecosystem.
Through Intellify , Cross Country's cloud-based workforce management and vendor management system, health systems gain clear visibility across internal and contingent labor.
Cybersecurity threats continue to increase in frequency and sophistication, thereby increasing the difficulty of detecting and defending against them.

catalysts.sentence: Kevin C. Clark, the Company's current Chairman of the Board, former CEO (from January 16, 2019 through March 31, 2022), and co-founder, was appointed President and CEO of the Company, effective December 15, 2025.

In the fourth quarter of 2025, we entered into a new Rule 10b5-1 Repurchase Plan to allow for share repurchases during the Company's blackout periods, beginning on December 16, 2025 and effective through November 4, 2026.

tamClaims.claim: The 2025 healthcare staffing market is estimated at $39.4 billion, comprising travel nursing $14.2B, per diem nursing $4.5B, allied health $9.8B, and locum tenens $9.6B.
tamClaims.sentence: Staffing Industry Analysts September 2025 report estimates the 2025 healthcare staffing markets had an aggregate market size of $39.4 billion, of which $14.2 billion was travel nursing, $4.5 billion was per diem nursing, $9.8 billion was allied health, and $9.6 billion was locum tenens and advanced practitioners.
